'''thongadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiomedial|labiomedial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiomedial|labiomedial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thongadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongadhithi|thongadhithi]] || [[word:thongadhiji|thongadhiji]] || [[word:thongadhishi|thongadhishi]] || [[word:thongadhiki|thongadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongadhuthuthu|thongadhuthuthu]] || [[word:thongadhujuju|thongadhujuju]] || [[word:thongadhushushu|thongadhushushu]] || [[word:thongadhukuku|thongadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadhuthu|thongadhuthu]] || [[word:thongadhuju|thongadhuju]] || [[word:thongadhushu|thongadhushu]] || [[word:thongadhuku|thongadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadhufthuf|thongadhufthuf]] || [[word:thongadhufjuf|thongadhufjuf]] || [[word:thongadhufshuf|thongadhufshuf]] || [[word:thongadhufkuf|thongadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongadhethe|thongadhethe]] || [[word:thongadheje|thongadheje]] || [[word:thongadheshe|thongadheshe]] || [[word:thongadheke|thongadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongadhothotho|thongadhothotho]] || [[word:thongadhojojo|thongadhojojo]] || [[word:thongadhoshosho|thongadhoshosho]] || [[word:thongadhokoko|thongadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadhotho|thongadhotho]] || [[word:thongadhojo|thongadhojo]] || [[word:thongadhosho|thongadhosho]] || [[word:thongadhoko|thongadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadhofthof|thongadhofthof]] || [[word:thongadhofjof|thongadhofjof]] || [[word:thongadhofshof|thongadhofshof]] || [[word:thongadhofkof|thongadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thongadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongadhĂŠthĂŠ|thongadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thongadhĂŠjĂŠ|thongadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thongadhĂŠshĂŠ|thongadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thongadhĂŠkĂŠ|thongadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongadhathatha|thongadhathatha]] || [[word:thongadhajaja|thongadhajaja]] || [[word:thongadhashasha|thongadhashasha]] || [[word:thongadhakaka|thongadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongadhatha|thongadhatha]] || [[word:thongadhaja|thongadhaja]] || [[word:thongadhasha|thongadhasha]] || [[word:thongadhaka|thongadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadhafthaf|thongadhafthaf]] || [[word:thongadhafjaf|thongadhafjaf]] || [[word:thongadhafshaf|thongadhafshaf]] || [[word:thongadhafkaf|thongadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thongadhasha|thongadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongadhshĂ«sha|thongadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongadhrosha|thongadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongadhmusha|thongadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongadhyasha|thongadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongadhnkshĂ«sha|gothongadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongadhnkrosha|gothongadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongadhnkmusha|gothongadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongadhnkyasha|gothongadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thongangadhasha|thongangadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongangadhshĂ«sha|thongangadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongangadhrosha|thongangadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongangadhmusha|thongangadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongangadhyasha|thongangadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongangadhnkshĂ«sha|gothongangadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongangadhnkrosha|gothongangadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongangadhnkmusha|gothongangadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongangadhnkyasha|gothongangadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thengĂŠdhasha|thengĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thengĂŠdhshĂ«sha|thengĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thengĂŠdhrosha|thengĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thengĂŠdhmusha|thengĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thengĂŠdhyasha|thengĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothengĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gothengĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothengĂŠdhnkrosha|gothengĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothengĂŠdhnkmusha|gothengĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothengĂŠdhnkyasha|gothengĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thongfadhasha|thongfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongfadhshĂ«sha|thongfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongfadhrosha|thongfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongfadhmusha|thongfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongfadhyasha|thongfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongfadhnkshĂ«sha|gothongfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongfadhnkrosha|gothongfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongfadhnkmusha|gothongfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongfadhnkyasha|gothongfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
